title: TypeRegistry
description: The meta-model itself: a self-describing registry that declares the legal node kinds and relation types of the fabric, including domain/range constraints and cardinality. The registry makes the graph a meta-model rather than an ad-hoc schema — kinds and predicates are first-class, versioned data.

nodeKind.description: Declaration of one node kind (a meta-class).

schema.description: IRI of the JSON Schema that validates entities of this kind.

abstract.description: If true, the kind cannot be instantiated directly.

relationType.description: Declaration of one relation type (a meta-predicate) with its domain/range constraints.

domain.description: Allowed node kinds for the 'from' endpoint. Empty = any.

range.description: Allowed node kinds for the 'to' endpoint. Empty = any.

symmetric.description: If true, the relation is undirected/symmetric.

transitive.description: If true, the predicate is transitive (e.g. DEPENDS_ON).

inverseOf.description: Name of the inverse predicate, if any.
